definitions.translation: according to someone's wish or preference

examples.no: for min del vil jeg si meg enig
examples.en: for my part, I would say I agree

examples.no: direktøren synes for sin del at det var en god idé
examples.en: the director, for his part, thinks it was a good idea

examples.no: for hans del passer det bra
examples.en: as far as he is concerned, it suits him well

examples.no: sesongen var over for hans del
examples.en: the season was over for him

examples.no: det blir for dyrt for vår del
examples.en: it becomes too expensive for us

examples.no: vi gjør ikke dette for pengenes del
examples.en: we are not doing this for the sake of the money
